title: cheahjs/free-llm-api-resources
friendlyTitle: A list of free LLM API options
summary: This repository tracks legitimate free tiers and trial credits for LLM inference APIs, including provider limits, model lists, and notes on data-use conditions.
friendlySummary: This repo lists services that offer free or trial access to AI model APIs, with notes about limits and rules.
whyItMatters: Builders can use it to prototype AI features cheaply, compare API constraints, and avoid dubious reverse-engineered services while testing models across providers.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it when you want to test AI apps without spending much money at the start.
